creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: ultima
Date: Thu Jun 29 18:18:48 UTC 2017
New revision: 444658
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/444658

Log:
  * Updated to 6.0
   - Support multiple configurations for same account type
   - PHP 7.1 compatibility
   - Courier users and mail aliases
   - Windows: Support unlocking of users with too many failed login attempts
   - Samba 3: added account expiration date to PDF fields LAM Pro:
   - Custom fields: can be used for file upload
   - Custom fields: new selection list type that gets options from LDAP search
   - Kopano support

  PR:		220292
  Submitted by:	<basil@vpm.net.ua> (maintainer)
  Reviewed by:	lifanov (mentor)
  Approved by:	lifanov (mentor)
  Differential Revision:	https://reviews.freebsd.org/D11383

Changes:
  head/sysutils/ldap-account-manager/Makefile
  head/sysutils/ldap-account-manager/distinfo
